name: Phase 9: Landing Page Core
description: Verifies that all sections of the landing page render and nav links function.

planSteps.description: Assert that the navbar contains the logo FUD.ai
Assert that the hero section main heading 'Detect FUD before it liquidates you.' is visible
Assert that the Live Demo section is visible on this homepage
Assert that the Footer is visible at the bottom of the page
Click the Docs link in the navbar to open the documentation
Assert that the browser URL contains /docs, and the documentation page displays the 'Introduction' header
